title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
author: Mike Schaekermann Research Lead
raw_description: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
summary: 谷歌研究显示其医疗AI系统AMIE在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生水平相当，成果发表于《自然》期刊。
analysis_note: 顶级AI在医疗领域的关键突破，发表于Nature，技术深度高，相关性极强。
